title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
description: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API workloads.
contentText: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API workloads.

title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
description: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
contentText: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
description: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
contentText: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.

title: understudy - 시연으로 배우는 로컬 데스크톱 에이전트
description: 사용자가 한 번 보여주면 의도와 절차를 학습해 반복 수행하는 데스크톱 자동화 에이전트입니다.
contentText: 사용자가 한 번 보여주면 의도와 절차를 학습해 반복 수행하는 데스크톱 자동화 에이전트. 워크플로 빌더 없이 직접 시연으로 학습하고, GUI·브라우저·쉘·파일시스템을 로컬 런타임에서 통합 제어합니다.

title: understudy-ai/understudy
description: Desktop automation agent that learns workflows from demonstrations and combines browser, shell, and local desktop control.
contentText: Desktop automation agent that learns workflows from demonstrations and combines browser, shell, and local desktop control.

title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary.
contentText: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary.

title: openclawai/mcp-mesh
description: TypeScript toolkit for MCP server composition, tool routing, and multi-agent orchestration workflows.
contentText: TypeScript toolkit for MCP server composition, tool routing, and multi-agent orchestration workflows.

title: retro-wallpaper-lab/ui-screens
description: Beautiful CSS wallpapers and nostalgic gradient themes for your browser homepage.
contentText: Beautiful CSS wallpapers and nostalgic gradient themes for your browser homepage.

title: Upright - Playwright와 Prometheus 메트릭을 활용한 합성 모니터링 엔진
description: 웹 서비스의 가용성과 성능을 계속 모니터링하기 위한 프레임워크입니다.
contentText: Playwright 기반 Probe와 Prometheus 메트릭 수집을 결합해 synthetic monitoring을 구성하는 프레임워크입니다. 브라우저 자동화와 운영 관측성을 동시에 건드립니다.

title: Show GN: 기온별 옷차림 | 오늘 뭐 입지?
Inside our approach to the Model Spec
description: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
contentText: OpenAI explains how the Model Spec balances safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
